name: Shatta
recipeInstructions:
1. Puree enough chili peppers to measure 1 cup in a blender.
2. Puree the parsley and cilantro together; mix well with the pureed chili peppers.
3. Add the garlic, seasonings (salt, pepper, cumin), and olive oil; blend until smooth.
4. Transfer the mixture into a jar and refrigerate for use in various recipes. It can also be stored for several months.
Yield: 1 1/2 cups
